title: Algerian Spiced Chicken Tagine
description: A traditional North African dish made with tender chicken, aromatic spices, and a sweet and tangy sauce. Serve over couscous or rice for a flavorful and nutritious meal.

ingredients.name: Algerian mildly spiced tagine spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at Middle Eastern markets or online

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality oil with a distinct flavor

instructions: Heat the oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the tagine spice blend and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the apricots, honey, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs and over couscous or rice.
